DashboardApprovals.title: Approval requests
DashboardApprovals.description: Review operations paused by wallet or API-key controls.
DashboardApprovals.emptyPending: No requests are waiting for approval
DashboardApprovals.emptyPendingDescription: New policy-gated operations will appear here as soon as they are submitted.
DashboardApprovals.emptyHistoryDescription: Approved, rejected, canceled, expired, and failed requests will appear here.
DashboardApprovals.emptyFilteredDescription: Clear one or more filters to see more approval requests.
DashboardApprovals.unableToLoadDescription: The request list could not be retrieved. Try loading it again.
DashboardApprovals.viewOnly: You can review approval requests, but your role cannot decide them.
DashboardApprovals.noAccess: Approval requests are not available for your role.
DashboardApprovals.noAccessDescription: Ask an organization administrator for wallet read access.
DashboardApprovals.reviewDescription: Confirm the policy context and operation details before making a decision.
DashboardApprovals.approveDescription: The operation will be released for execution. This decision cannot be undone.
DashboardApprovals.rejectDescription: The operation will be canceled and cannot be resumed from this request.
DashboardApprovals.cancelDescription: The pending operation will be canceled without an approval decision.
DashboardApprovals.alreadyDecided: This request was already decided. The latest status is now shown.
DashboardApprovals.forbiddenDecision: Your role does not have permission to decide approval requests.
DashboardApprovals.decisionFailed: The request could not be updated. Try again.
DashboardApprovals.noMatchedControls: No matched controls were reported for this evaluation.
DashboardApprovals.submittedEventDescription: The operation was paused for approval.
